description: Modifies the original Settings class provided by the user

log_level.description: The minimum log level to capture.
log_level.title: Log Level

service_name.description: The name of the (micro-)service. This will be included in log messages.
service_name.title: Service Name

service_instance_id.description: A string that uniquely identifies this instance across all instances of this service. This is included in log messages.
service_instance_id.title: Service Instance Id

log_format.description: If set, will replace JSON formatting with the specified string format. If not set, has no effect. In addition to the standard attributes, the following can also be specified: timestamp, service, instance, level, correlation_id, and details
log_format.title: Log Format

log_traceback.description: Whether to include exception tracebacks in log messages.
log_traceback.title: Log Traceback

s3_access_key_id.description: Part of credentials for login into the S3 service. See: https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/guide/credentials.html
s3_access_key_id.title: S3 Access Key Id

s3_secret_access_key.description: Part of credentials for login into the S3 service. See: https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/guide/credentials.html
s3_secret_access_key.title: S3 Secret Access Key

s3_session_token.description: Part of credentials for login into the S3 service. See: https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/guide/credentials.html
s3_session_token.title: S3 Session Token

aws_config_ini.description: Path to a config file for specifying more advanced S3 parameters. This should follow the format described here: https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/guide/configuration.html#using-a-configuration-file
aws_config_ini.title: Aws Config Ini

buckets.description: List of bucket IDs to check for stale multipart uploads.
buckets.title: Buckets

cleanup_interval.description: Number of days after which multipart uploads are considered stale and will be aborted.0 is allowed to remove all multipart uploads regardless of their age.
cleanup_interval.title: Cleanup Interval

title: ModSettings
